'''Noy Waglla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hyallp]] assassin who was in the employ of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Waglla successfully sneaked through the defenses of [[Colony Four]] on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] and made it to the dormitories where a few of the [[t'landa Til]] priests resided. There she placed small drops of the poison [[srejptan]] on the lips of the sleeping priests, killing the large sentients before they could awake from their slumber. She was only one of many of Jabba the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] assassins that would prepare the world for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] invasion that would later be called the [[Battle of Ylesia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
